rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in valid AADL scopes: component type for assumptions/guarantees, implementation for bindings.
Component ports referenced in contracts must be declared in the appropriate scope; subcomponent ports are not valid in type contracts.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structural integrity when inserting AGREE annexes by aligning with component type or implementation scope.
Only reference ports and types that are explicitly declared in the AADL model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should be scoped to component types; assignments to implementations.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes or vice versa.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
